summary: Iteration 30: Brand Portal Story Integrations + Login/Register Portal Buttons - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Brand Portal 'Story Integrations' tab shows real story excerpts with LearnTech Pro mentions from narratives like 'SJ and the Turbo-Rex Grand Prix', (2) Summary stats displayed (Stories: 5, Mentions: 5, Responses: 0, Avg Comprehension: 0%), (3) Student Activation Responses shows proper empty state, (4) Login/Register pages have 'Access Your Portal' section with Parents/Brands/Students buttons, (5) Admin can access brand-portal/story-integrations API, (6) Non-admin users correctly redirected from /admin to /portal, (7) Dark theme consistent across all pages.
seed_data_creation: Created test guardian user iter30test_cd99bc@test.com during admin protection testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Portal Story Integrations fully working. The API /api/brand-portal/story-integrations returns story_snippets with narrative_title, excerpts, student_name and summary stats. Admin users can access brand portal by navigating to /brand-portal after login. The 'Story Integrations' tab shows real excerpts featuring LearnTech Pro brand. Student Activation Responses section shows empty state when no written_answers exist. Login and Register pages have 'Access Your Portal' section with 3 buttons (Parents, Brands, Students). Dark theme is consistent across all pages.
